Operation 'updateUser' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is concise and clear, but description is completely missing. Added details about what user properties can be updated, authentication/authorization requirements, partial update support, and return value for AI agent clarity.

data.description_suggestion: Updates user account properties such as email, display name, and password. Requires authentication and appropriate access control permissions. Accepts partial updates - only provided fields will be modified. Returns the updated user object with all current properties.
data.reasoning: Summary is concise and clear, but description is completely missing. Added details about what user properties can be updated, authentication/authorization requirements, partial update support, and return value for AI agent clarity.

message: Operation 'deleteUser' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_side_effects. Summary is adequate, but description is missing. Added context about permanence, authorization requirements, and side effects (removal of tokens and ACL entries) to help AI agents understand the full impact of this destructive operation.

data.description_suggestion: Permanently removes a user account from the system. Requires authentication and appropriate access control permissions. This operation is irreversible. Associated API tokens and access control entries for the deleted user will also be removed.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate, but description is missing. Added context about permanence, authorization requirements, and side effects (removal of tokens and ACL entries) to help AI agents understand the full impact of this destructive operation.

message: Operation 'listUserTokens' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. Summary is clear and action-oriented, but description is missing. Added details about what information is returned and clarified that token secrets are not exposed for security purposes.

data.current_summary: List API tokens for a user
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all API tokens associated with a specific user account. Returns a list of token metadata including token names, creation dates, and expiration information. Does not return the actual token secrets for security reasons.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented, but description is missing. Added details about what information is returned and clarified that token secrets are not exposed for security purposes.

message: Operation 'getToken' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. Summary is vague ('info' is non-specific). Improved to 'Retrieve API token metadata' for clarity. Description is missing entirely - added details about what metadata is returned, security note about token secrets, and authorization requirements.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed information about a specific API token including its name, creation date, expiration date, and associated permissions. Does not return the token secret itself. Requires authentication and appropriate access control permissions.
data.reasoning: Summary is vague ('info' is non-specific). Improved to 'Retrieve API token metadata' for clarity. Description is missing entirely - added details about what metadata is returned, security note about token secrets, and authorization requirements.

message: Operation 'createToken' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description is missing - added details about optional parameters (expiration, scope), return value including the secret, and the use case for token-based authentication.

data.description_suggestion: Creates a new API token for the specified user account. Accepts optional parameters for token expiration and permission scope. Returns the newly created token including the secret value (only displayed once). The token can be used for API authentication in place of username/password credentials.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description is missing - added details about optional parameters (expiration, scope), return value including the secret, and the use case for token-based authentication.

message: Operation 'updateToken' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary is adequate but generic. Description is missing - added details about what can be updated, partial update support, return value, and clarification about token secret immutability.

data.description_suggestion: Modifies properties of an existing API token such as expiration date or permission scope. Supports partial updates - only provided fields will be modified. Returns the updated token metadata. The token secret itself cannot be changed; a new token must be created if the secret is compromised.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate but generic. Description is missing - added details about what can be updated, partial update support, return value, and clarification about token secret immutability.

message: Operation 'deleteToken' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description is missing - added details about the permanent nature of revocation, immediate effect on authentication, and impact on dependent applications.

data.description_suggestion: Permanently revokes and removes an API token from the system. The token will no longer be valid for authentication. This operation is irreversible - any applications or scripts using this token will immediately lose access.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description is missing - added details about the permanent nature of revocation, immediate effect on authentication, and impact on dependent applications.
